subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto those who dwell in the realm of possibility, that all may draw nigh through it unto God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان لیقربن الکل به الی الله رب العالمین من آمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial, @Word of God and human limitations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
